attempts.script_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type GROUND_RADAR_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor acq_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform_type INTRUDER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 300 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform radar_site GROUND_RADAR_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.84n 104.29e speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor acq_radar
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform blue_intruder INTRUDER_TYPE
   side blue
   heading 230 deg
   route
      position 31.00n 104.50e altitude 5000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 5000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/basic_iads_c2.aer
end_event_pipe

eve

script_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type GROUND_RADAR_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor acq_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
end_platform_type

platform_type INTRUDER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_AIR_MOVER
      maximum_speed 300 m/sec
      minimum_speed 100 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform radar_site GROUND_RADAR_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.84n 104.29e speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor acq_radar
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform blue_intruder INTRUDER_TYPE
   side blue
   heading 230 deg
   route
      position 31.00n 104.50e altitude 5000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.80n 104.25e altitude 5000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/basic_iads_c2.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/basic_iads_c2.evt
end_event_output

end_time 480 sec
